data.user_message:
Hello, thanks for making time for this. I'm the Director of Employment Services at the Palestinian Ministry of Labor — I run the division that's supposed to help young Palestinians, mostly between fifteen and twenty-nine, find work. 

The honest truth is, right now we're failing them. A young person walks into one of our offices, we take down their details on paper, maybe help them put together a basic CV, and then... we just lose track of them. Six months later we have no idea if they found a job, if their skills ever matched anything real, nothing. That's the thing that bothers me most — we're supposed to be a government service helping people, and we have nothing to show for it.

What I want is some kind of platform — a system, a website, I'm not sure exactly what to call it — that brings job seekers and employers together properly, so my staff aren't just guessing who to call, and so I can actually tell my government and our international partners what's happening in the labour market. Does that make sense as a starting point?
data.assistant_message: Thank you for sharing that context. It certainly provides a clear picture of the challenges you're facing. Let's start by understanding the current state and the key pain points in more detail. You mentioned that the current process involves taking down details on paper and losing track of job seekers. Could you elaborate on the top three pain points in this process? Specifically, what are the most critical issues that hinder your division's ability to effectively connect young people with employment opportunities?

critical_gaps.label: System Purpose & Goals
critical_gaps.description: What problem does the system solve and why does it exist?

critical_gaps.label: System Scope & Boundaries
critical_gaps.description: What is inside and outside the system boundary?

critical_gaps.label: Stakeholders & User Classes
critical_gaps.description: Who are the users and stakeholders of the system?

critical_gaps.label: Functional Requirements
critical_gaps.description: What must the system do? Core features and behaviours.

critical_gaps.label: Performance Requirements
critical_gaps.description: How fast must the system respond? What load must it handle?

critical_gaps.label: Usability & Accessibility
critical_gaps.description: How easy must the system be to use? Any accessibility requirements?

critical_gaps.label: Security & Privacy Requirements
critical_gaps.description: How must the system protect data and prevent unauthorised access?

critical_gaps.label: Reliability & Availability
critical_gaps.description: How reliable must the system be? Expected uptime / recovery time?

critical_gaps.label: Job Matching System
critical_gaps.description: How should the platform facilitate matching between job seekers and employers?

critical_gaps.label: User Tracking and Follow-up
critical_gaps.description: What mechanisms should be in place to track user progress after initial contact?

critical_gaps.label: Data Collection and Reporting
critical_gaps.description: What types of data and reports are needed to inform stakeholders about the labor market?

critical_gaps.label: User Interface and Experience
critical_gaps.description: What are the key features of the user interface that will enhance user experience?

critical_gaps.label: CV Creation and Management
critical_gaps.description: How should the platform assist users in creating and managing their CVs?

critical_gaps.label: Communication Tools
critical_gaps.description: What communication tools are necessary for interaction between job seekers and employers?

critical_gaps.label: Security and Privacy
critical_gaps.description: What security and privacy measures are required to protect user data?

important_gaps.label: Use Cases & User Stories
important_gaps.description: How do users interact with the system step-by-step?

important_gaps.label: Business Rules & Constraints
important_gaps.description: What business rules and legal constraints must the system respect?

important_gaps.label: Maintainability
important_gaps.description: How easy must the system be to maintain and extend?

important_gaps.label: Scalability
important_gaps.description: How must the system handle growth in users or data volume?

important_gaps.label: External Interfaces
important_gaps.description: What external services and APIs must the system integrate with?

important_gaps.label: Data Requirements
important_gaps.description: What data must the system create, store, and manage?

important_gaps.label: Design & Implementation Constraints
important_gaps.description: What technical, legal, or resource constraints apply?

optional_gaps.label: Assumptions & Dependencies
optional_gaps.description: What assumptions could invalidate requirements if wrong?

optional_gaps.label: Testability & Acceptance Criteria
optional_gaps.description: How will requirements be verified? What are the acceptance criteria?

optional_gaps.label: Deployment & Operations
optional_gaps.description: Where and how will the system be deployed and operated?
